proven.claim: Proven: "--no-hook" is documented in help (line 558) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 558
; Proven: "--no-hook" is documented in help (line 558) and consumed by
; args.includes("--no-hook") in runInit, which skips HookInstaller.install().
(declare-const nohook_documented Int)
(declare-const nohook_consumed Int)
(assert (= nohook_documented 1))
; if (!args.includes("--no-hook")) { hookInstaller.install(); } — guards hook installation
(assert (= nohook_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= nohook_documented nohook_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --no-hook is documented and gates hook installation
